allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const keys = ['ai','@ai-sdk/anthropic','@ai-sdk/react','@ai-sdk/provider']; keys.forEach\(k => console.log\(k+':', p.dependencies[k] || p.devDependencies?.[k]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('zod:', p.dependencies.zod || p.devDependencies?.zod\)")
Bash(node -e "try { require\('@ai-sdk/react'\); console.log\('found'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not found'\); }")
Bash(node -e "const ai = require\('ai'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ai\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('chat'\) || k === 'Message' || k === 'useChat'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const ai = require\('ai'\); const keys = Object.keys\(ai\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => ['Message','streamText','appendResponseMessages','tool','useChat'].includes\(k\)\)\)")
